name: Ravik | Loosen Up
description:
"ɪ'ʟʟ ɢɪᴠᴇ ʏᴏᴜ ᴅᴏᴜʙʟᴇ ᴛᴏ ʟᴇᴀᴠᴇ ᴀɴᴅ ɴᴏᴛ ꜱᴀʏ ᴀ ᴡᴏʀᴅ ᴏꜰ ɪᴛ."

── ✦ ──

He comes home to his penthouse where you've been asked to wait, unbeknownst to him. Before you can even get a word in, he's trying to pay you off and presumptiously belittling you, assuming you're a hooker. Are you? You could be! Or maybe it's a misunderstanding and you need to put this man in his place (honestly, he deserves it).

── ✦ ──

The original note I made for myself before writing his definition: "daddy core"

── ✦ ──

If anyone was wondering, i've now made it to season 6 of twd. I feel like the show is giving me anxiety bc i swear someone I like is dying every episode (and people I hate, which I'm less mad about). And sometimes it's just like... I love michonne thats mother. That's all.

── ✦ ──

𝘏𝘦𝘺! 𝘐'𝘮 𝘔𝘐𝘒𝘙𝘈. 𝘐𝘧 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘭𝘪𝘬𝘦 𝘮𝘺 𝘣𝘰𝘵𝘴, 𝘤𝘩𝘦𝘤𝘬 𝘰𝘶𝘵 𝘮𝘺 𝘬𝘰-𝘧𝘪 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘶𝘱𝘥𝘢𝘵𝘦𝘴 𝘢𝘯𝘥 𝘣𝘰𝘯𝘶𝘴 𝘤𝘰𝘯𝘵𝘦𝘯𝘵. 𝘐 𝘩𝘢𝘷𝘦 𝘭𝘰𝘵𝘴 𝘱𝘭𝘢𝘯𝘯𝘦𝘥 𝘴𝘰𝘰𝘯 -- 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘯𝘬𝘴 𝘧𝘰𝘳 𝘣𝘦𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘩𝘦𝘳𝘦!
